name: A.P.Mller-Mrsk A/S Navne-Aktier
summary: A.P. Moller-Maersk A/S is a global transport and logistics company engaged in container shipping, ports, and logistics services. The company operates an integrated network of container vessels, terminals, and inland transportation to facilitate global trade. A.P. Moller-Maersk is headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark.
